free_text: Neutron Inelastic Scattering Cross Sections for 51V
Proton recoil telescope used to monitor neutron flux.
Data given have been corrected for neutron attenuation,
gamma-ray attenuation, and neutron multiple scattering
No information on source of uncertainties.
Data received in private comm., Mittler, 1975/3.
Convered to new date formats, lower case.
